text: What if learning isn't a strict pyramid? Bloom's taxonomy offers a framework for learning, but it’s not a one-size-fits-all. Think of it like a web — connections matter more than levels. Research suggests learning can be non-linear, adapting to individual needs. Embrace your unique learning path, breaking free from rigid structures. Curious about your learning style? Hit follow for more insights!
